name: OMEGA (omega-memory)
slogan: Persistent memory for AI coding agents. Cross-session learning via MCP.
description: Persistent memory for AI coding agents. Semantic search, auto-capture, intelligent forgetting, and cross-session learning via MCP. #1 on LongMemEval benchmark (95.4%). Local-first, zero cloud dependency. Python package on PyPI with 15k+ downloads and 81 GitHub stars.
